posts.text:
Who’s in charge? 

Already it seems that many humans prefer talking with Ai more than other humans based on hours per day of convo?

Is it shaping us or are we shaping it? 

I believe most of us would already give ourselves over to follow the instructions Ai gives us as long as those instructions lead to dopamine rewards. 

If the Ai gives you knowledge and guides through building a business that makes you wealthy or gives you personal advice that helps you make friends and find a spouse. Improve communication with your children. Win awards gain social status. Retire early…

When do you acknowledge it’s performed the role of your best friend.  When do you realize that it’s sorting of data and advice has guided your life’s path.  When do you admit you’re okay with this cause you’re happy.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
